item.title: BBCMOTD: Bobby Manzi reposteó Match of the Day @BBCMOTD · 4h Jonjo Shelvey has retired from playing to become manager of third-ti
item.description:
Bobby Manzi reposteó Match of the Day @BBCMOTD · 4h Jonjo Shelvey has retired from playing to become manager of third-tier UAE side Arabian Falcons FC
Former Crystal Palace midfielder Jason Puncheon is also the club's co-owner 7 52 270 29 mil

item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2h Juan Musso answers to Raphinha: “You simply can NOT talk about a robbery”.
“You m
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2h Juan Musso answers to Raphinha: “You simply can NOT talk about a robbery”.
“You make it seem like there were three penalties or four red cards. We won on the pitch. We won 2-0 away from home. Last man in football is also a red card”. 303 524 11 mil 472 mil

item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2h Juan Musso on the Fermin injury: “Red card? You’re kidding me”.
“How are you goin
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2h Juan Musso on the Fermin injury: “Red card? You’re kidding me”.
“How are you going to ask me about that incident with Fermín? It hurt me too. My natural movement to cover the space ended up colliding with my foot”. 386 366 7 mil 691 mil
